name: weather
description: Weather block class — a $block subclass that displays current conditions, a forecast, and recent history for a configured place. Owner sets `place`, `units`, and `forecast_hours`; an external plug Worker (catalogs/weather/plug) fetches tomorrow.io on a schedule and pushes data via apikey-bound session.

classes.description: A weather display block. The owner configures `place` (a location string the upstream API understands, e.g. "Mountain View, CA"), `units` ("metric" or "imperial"), and `forecast_hours` (how many hours of forecast to surface). The plug pushes `current` as a scalar shape (headline temperature), `forecast` as a table (hourly), and `history` as a series. `last_pushed_at` and `last_error` ride the standard $block writable_self surface so :look surfaces freshness.

verbs.name: weather_line
verbs.source: verb :weather_line() rxd { let current = this.current; let place = this.place; if (typeof(place) != "string" || !place) { place = "this place"; } if (typeof(current) == "map" && has(current, "value")) { let unit = ""; if (has(current, "unit") && current["unit"]) { unit = current["unit"]; } let label = "Weather"; if (has(current, "label") && current["label"] == "current_temperature") { label = "Temperature"; } return label + " in " + place + ": " + to_string(current["value"]) + unit; } return "Weather for " + place + ": no current reading yet"; }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let line = this:weather_line(); let updated = this.last_pushed_at; let freshness = "Last updated: never."; if (typeof(updated) == "number" && updated > 0) { freshness = "Last updated: " + to_string(updated) + "."; } let text = line + ". " + freshness; if (this.last_error) { text = text + " Error: " + to_string(this.last_error) + "."; } return { id: this, title: line, description: text, current: this.current, forecast: this.forecast, history: this.history, last_pushed_at: updated, last_updated: updated, last_error: this.last_error, location: location(this) }; }

classes.description: Metadata holder for the weather catalog: keeps the default summary_props list separate from the live class so plug installers and UI introspection can read it without colliding with subclass overrides.
